data.name: NewsFavoriteSourceDuplicated
data.value: Favorite source with this SourceId already exists for the given NewsApiKey

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingFavoriteSource
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the favorite source.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorProcessingRequest
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: InvalidFavoriteSourceRequest
data.value: The favorite source request contains invalid values.

data.name: InvalidFavoriteSourceQuery
data.value: The query parameters for favorite sources contain invalid values.
